title: Berglander Dinner Spoons Set 24pcs, 18.7cm Food Grade Stainless Steel Silverware Soup Spoon Tablespoon for Home, Kitchen or Restaurant Mirror Polished, Dishwasher Safe
features: 24-Piece Bulk Set & Perfect 18.7cm (7.36") Size: Includes 24 dinner spoons, ideal for home use (daily meals, family gatherings) and commercial spaces (restaurants, hotels, catered events) – enough to serve large groups or restock silverware efficiently.
Food Grade Stainless Steel: Made from premium food-safe stainless steel – durable for long-term use, even with frequent washing and heavy daily service.

Mirror Polished Finish & Elegant Design: Sleek mirror polish adds a refined touch to any table setting, matching existing silverware and elevating both casual and formal dining experiences (weddings, dinners, parties).
Dishwasher Safe & Easy to Clean: Safe for top and bottom racks of dishwashers; the smooth polished surface prevents food residue buildup, so cleanup is fast and hassle-free.

Ergonomic Handle for Comfort: Contoured, balanced handle fits comfortably in hands of all sizes, reducing fatigue during extended use (e.g., serving guests at a party or using for daily meals at home).
